title: Distributed AI Gateway
description: Engineered a highly concurrent API gateway to protect LLM endpoints. Implemented a Token Bucket rate limiter using Redis & Lua scripting to guarantee atomicity and prevent race conditions.

title: FlashForm
description: Developed a robust backend system designed for flash sales. Leveraged Spring Boot, Redis for caching, and RabbitMQ for asynchronous message queuing to handle sudden traffic surges without overselling.
